commands.title: Las skarmen
commands.command: bash -lc 'sid=$(loginctl list-sessions --no-legend | awk -v u="$USER" '\''$3==u {print $1; exit}'\''); [ -n "$sid" ] && loginctl lock-session "$sid" || { echo "No active session found for $USER" >&2; exit 1; }'

commands.title: Vilolage
commands.command: sudo -n /usr/bin/busctl call org.freedesktop.login1 /org/freedesktop/login1 org.freedesktop.login1.Manager Suspend b false
